Episodes.Title: Meaning
Episodes.Writer: David Shore, Lawrence Kaplow, Russel Friend
Episodes.Actors: Hugh Laurie, Lisa Edelstein, Omar Epps
Episodes.Plot: Richard, a husband and father living with brain cancer, drives his wheelchair into a pool at a family BBQ. Everyone but his son think that it was suicide from the pain but House will stop at nothing to figure out his true ailment.

Episodes.Title: Cane and Able
Episodes.Writer: David Shore, Russel Friend, Garrett Lerner
Episodes.Actors: Hugh Laurie, Lisa Edelstein, Omar Epps
Episodes.Plot: House is affected by the fact that he thinks he didn't solve the last case while a young boy, who believes aliens tortured him, is brought in.

Episodes.Title: Informed Consent
Episodes.Writer: David Shore, David Foster, Pam Davis
Episodes.Actors: Hugh Laurie, Lisa Edelstein, Omar Epps
Episodes.Plot: House and his team face a lot of moral dilemmas when a patient wants them to help him end his life.

Episodes.Title: Lines in the Sand
Episodes.Writer: David Shore, David Hoselton, Pam Davis
Episodes.Actors: Hugh Laurie, Lisa Edelstein, Omar Epps
Episodes.Plot: A ten-year-old boy begins screaming in pain, but nobody knows why, because he is autistic and cannot explain. House refuses to use his office because it has new carpet.

Episodes.Title: Fools for Love
Episodes.Writer: David Shore, Peter Blake, Pam Davis
Episodes.Actors: Hugh Laurie, Lisa Edelstein, Omar Epps
Episodes.Plot: A husband and wife being treated cause Foreman to ponder the strength of true love, and House abuses one too many patients with potentially devastating repercussions.

Episodes.Title: Que Será Será
Episodes.Writer: David Shore, Thomas L. Moran, Pam Davis
Episodes.Actors: Hugh Laurie, Lisa Edelstein, Omar Epps
Episodes.Plot: An obese man in a coma presents treatment challenges, but finding out what's wrong with him may be the most challenging test of all. Elsewhere, Tritter ramps up his vendetta against House.

Episodes.Title: Son of Coma Guy
Episodes.Writer: David Shore, Doris Egan, Pam Davis
Episodes.Actors: Hugh Laurie, Lisa Edelstein, Omar Epps
Episodes.Plot: When the son of a man in a vegetative state starts going into a coma, the vegetative man is reawakened chemically by House, who hopes to get some clues to the son's problems.

Episodes.Title: Whac-A-Mole
Episodes.Writer: David Shore, Pam Davis, David Hoselton
Episodes.Actors: Hugh Laurie, Lisa Edelstein, Omar Epps
Episodes.Plot: A young man collapses at his job, and House makes a game of establishing the diagnosis until things turn critical, and Tritter increases the pressure on Wilson.

Episodes.Title: Finding Judas
Episodes.Writer: David Shore, Sara Hess, Pam Davis
Episodes.Actors: Hugh Laurie, Lisa Edelstein, Omar Epps
Episodes.Plot: While a little girl's life and limbs are in jeopardy, Tritter becomes more manipulative and House suffers withdrawal.

Episodes.Title: Merry Little Christmas
Episodes.Writer: David Shore, Liz Friedman, Pam Davis
Episodes.Actors: Hugh Laurie, Lisa Edelstein, Omar Epps
Episodes.Plot: Wilson presents the deal to House and then convinces Cuddy to back him up, meanwhile the team is flummoxed by a patient's condition and various members keep seeking out House for his opinion even though he may not be prepared to a...

Episodes.Title: Words and Deeds
Episodes.Writer: David Shore, Leonard Dick, Pam Davis
Episodes.Actors: Hugh Laurie, Lisa Edelstein, Omar Epps
Episodes.Plot: House checks himself into rehab just before his trial, but a different game entirely may be afoot. Elsewhere, the team attempts to treat a firefighter who can't stop shivering.

Episodes.Title: One Day, One Room
Episodes.Writer: David Shore, Pam Davis, David Hoselton
Episodes.Actors: Hugh Laurie, Lisa Edelstein, Omar Epps
Episodes.Plot: Stuck with clinic duty, House almost wishes he had the boring patients back after he encounters a young woman with an STD and the need to talk.

Episodes.Title: Needle in a Haystack
Episodes.Writer: David Shore, David Foster, Pam Davis
Episodes.Actors: Hugh Laurie, Lisa Edelstein, Omar Epps
Episodes.Plot: A young man is stricken during sex with his girlfriend, and House must determine why his organs are suddenly shutting down. Finding the cause is like looking for a needle in a haystack.

Episodes.Title: Insensitive
Episodes.Writer: David Shore, Matthew V. Lewis, Pam Davis
Episodes.Actors: Hugh Laurie, Lisa Edelstein, Omar Epps
Episodes.Plot: On Valentine's Day, House meddles in relationships as he works to diagnose a teenager who has a genetic inability to feel pain.

Episodes.Title: Half-Wit
Episodes.Writer: David Shore, Lawrence Kaplow, Pam Davis
Episodes.Actors: Hugh Laurie, Lisa Edelstein, Omar Epps
Episodes.Plot: House struggles to find out why a pianist savant is losing his ability to play. Ultimately, a decision must be made as to how much brain is necessary for a normal quality of life.

Episodes.Title: Top Secret
Episodes.Writer: David Shore, Thomas L. Moran, Pam Davis
Episodes.Actors: Hugh Laurie, Lisa Edelstein, Omar Epps
Episodes.Plot: A patient whose relative has called in a favor with Cuddy presents with nonspecific minor symptoms that turn life-threatening, but House is distracted by a dream and an inability to urinate.

Episodes.Title: Fetal Position
Episodes.Writer: David Shore, Russel Friend, Garrett Lerner
Episodes.Actors: Hugh Laurie, Lisa Edelstein, Omar Epps
Episodes.Plot: When a pregnant woman has a stroke, the team is at a loss after all tests reveal nothing, but when her organs start shutting down Cuddy takes over the case.

Episodes.Title: Airborne
Episodes.Writer: David Shore, David Hoselton, Pam Davis
Episodes.Actors: Hugh Laurie, Lisa Edelstein, Omar Epps
Episodes.Plot: House and Cuddy are flying back to the US from an international conference in Singapore. While en route a mysterious disease strikes one passenger and an epidemic unfolds, causing House to diagnose in midair since they have missed...

Episodes.Title: Act Your Age
Episodes.Writer: David Shore, Sara Hess, Pam Davis
Episodes.Actors: Hugh Laurie, Lisa Edelstein, Omar Epps
Episodes.Plot: A young girl is ailed with diseases that usually strike people much older than her 6 years of age. But before House can diagnose her, her brother starts exhibiting the same symptoms she was admitted with. During all of this House ...

Episodes.Title: House Training
Episodes.Writer: David Shore, Doris Egan, Pam Davis
Episodes.Actors: Hugh Laurie, Lisa Edelstein, Omar Epps
Episodes.Plot: The cause of a woman's TIA stumps the team, and Foreman's family visits.

Episodes.Title: Family
Episodes.Writer: David Shore, Liz Friedman, Pam Davis
Episodes.Actors: Hugh Laurie, Lisa Edelstein, Omar Epps
Episodes.Plot: Wilson is preparing his 14-year-old patient, Nick, for a bone marrow transplant when the donor, Nick's younger brother Matty, suddenly starts sneezing. Since Nick's immune system has been destroyed by the chemotherapy for his canc...

Episodes.Title: Resignation
Episodes.Writer: David Shore, Pam Davis, David Hoselton
Episodes.Actors: Hugh Laurie, Lisa Edelstein, Omar Epps
Episodes.Plot: A college girl suddenly coughs up blood during karate class. Foreman resigns. A vegan couple has problems with floating poop. House secretly drugs Wilson with amphetamine.

Episodes.Title: The Jerk
Episodes.Writer: David Shore, Leonard Dick, Pam Davis
Episodes.Actors: Hugh Laurie, Lisa Edelstein, Omar Epps
Episodes.Plot: When a teenage chess player assaults his opponent, the team struggles to determine whether the problem is organic or psychological. Clinic Cases: Spotted sunburn.

Episodes.Title: Human Error
Episodes.Writer: David Shore, Thomas L. Moran, Lawrence Kaplow
Episodes.Actors: Hugh Laurie, Lisa Edelstein, Omar Epps
Episodes.Plot: A couple risk their lives getting from Cuba to see House, but his preoccupation with staff issues may cost the woman her life.
